creator: daniel.tihanyi@tetragir.com
text: @Basil: with this Makefile, caddy will install to /usr/local/bin/caddy. This is the standard location on FreeBSD. I'm also creating a sample Caddyfile in /usr/local/etc/caddy/Caddyfile, but the user is free to put the config anywhere and point the rc script also there.
